note: PancakeSwap IFO depositPool(uint256 _amount, uint8 _pid) — overflow-commitment COMMIT: subscribe _amount of the raising LP token (lpToken() immutable = 0xa527a617... CAKE-BNB PancakePair on this Horizon IFOV2 instance) to pool _pid (0=Basic/capped, 1=Unlimited/overflow). Maps to launchpad::Commit (platform=pancakeswap_ifo, amount=$args._amount, recipient=$from — depositPool credits msg.sender, NO recipient arg). selector 0x7f1bdd76 keccak-verified (cast sig) AND confirmed on the BscScan-verified IFOV2 instance. pay_token is NOT in calldata (raising token is a sale-contract immutable) so it is pinned to this instance's lpToken(); each IFO is a fresh CREATE2 clone with its own lpToken — see surface _deployments note DEFER(1). live_inputs (sale_state/user_cap/user_committed/expected_token_price) are user_supplied placeholders: no IFO sale-state enrichment is wired, so they decode as skeletons (commit-usd-cap stays decode-only, esp. on BSC which is outside the price-enrichment core).
